'''Morobe''' was the primary [[Color/Legends|red-yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Binary/Legends|binary]] [[Star system/Legends|system]], [[Morobe system|Morobe]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
